title: Omnitex Box 200 Premium Disposable Blue Nitrile Gloves | Powder Free | Latex Free | Ambidextrous | Food Safe | Examination Non Sterile | CE & UKCA Cat3 grade (Large)
features: Omnitex Premium Disposable Blue Nitrile Gloves, Powder Free, Latex Free
Category III PPE Compliant (Reg 2016/425) and Class 1 Medical Device Compliant
Meets EN455, EN374 and EN420 standards.
Excellent Elasticity, tactile sensitivity, Chemical resistance, Finger Tips Textured
Skin friendly & Food Safe: free from phthalates/ softeners and allergenic latex proteins.
Ambidextrous: Designed to be used by left-handed and right-handed people with equal ease
All Sizes are in a Box of 200.
